combined_text: Slayer: Jeff Hanneman died of cirrhosis Departed Slayer: Jeff Hanneman died of cirrhosis Published May 10, 2013 Associated Press Facebook Twitter Email This 2009 publicity photo provided courtesy of Slayer shows, from left, Dave Lombardo, Kerry King, Jeff Hanneman and Tom Araya. Hanneman, 49, a founding member of the heavy metal band Slay
